findings.issue: Privileged endpoints need explicit role and scope matrix
findings.evidence_span: delete_invoice() accepts user_id but checks only is_authenticated
findings.recommended_fix: Define required roles/scopes per operation and verify them before mutation.

findings.issue: Object access must bind the resource owner or tenant boundary
findings.evidence_span: invoice_id is loaded without checking tenant_id or owner_id against the caller
findings.recommended_fix: Check tenant/resource ownership before returning or mutating objects.

findings.issue: Authorization failures need non-leaking error envelope
findings.evidence_span: raw permission details can reveal whether an invoice id exists
findings.recommended_fix: Return consistent 403/404 style envelopes with request_id and no internal policy details.
